name: goliath/wg-future-costs
title: Why Goliath – Future Costs
description: Grey band section explaining the long-term cost benefits of Goliath over traditional upright replacement.

heading.default: The Right Way to Save Future Costs

p1.default: Choosing to replace uprights every time they are damaged is the most expensive solution.

p2.default: This is because every replacement involves:

default: Loss of storage capacity under certain conditions

p3.default: Goliath™ reduces that recurring expense by strengthening the uprights and preventing repeat damage in the same location. By doing this, there is a reduced need for future repairs.

p4.default: That means lower maintenance costs, fewer repair runs, and better budget control.
